levels.name: Без сленга
levels.instruction: Use clean conversational standard American English. Do not use internet slang.

levels.name: Легкий
levels.tooltip: Естественные contractions и один легкий разговорный оборот.
levels.instruction: Use natural contractions and at most one light casual expression when it fits.

levels.name: Разговорный
levels.instruction: Use clearly casual contemporary DM phrasing with one or two natural colloquial markers.

levels.name: Молодежный
levels.tooltip: Современная онлайн-речь, но без мемной перегрузки.
levels.instruction: Use a modern younger-adult DM voice with several natural casual markers, avoiding caricature.

levels.name: Сильный
levels.tooltip: Плотный contemporary online/DM slang, если смысл это выдерживает.
levels.instruction: Use dense contemporary online/DM slang and casual syntax where appropriate, but avoid outdated meme slang.

levels.name: Нет
levels.instruction: Use no flirtation. Keep the message neutral unless the source explicitly requires it.

levels.name: Легкий
levels.instruction: Add a warm, lightly interested undertone without obvious seduction.

levels.name: Игривый
levels.instruction: Use playful teasing and mild flirtation while preserving the source meaning.

levels.name: Явный
levels.instruction: Make the flirtation clear and confident without crude wording.

levels.name: Соблазняющий
levels.instruction: Use a bold seductive flirt tone, but do not invent explicit sexual details absent from the source.

levels.name: Чисто
levels.instruction: Use no profanity or crude wording.

levels.name: Мягко
levels.tooltip: Редкая мягкая грубость, только если уместно.
levels.instruction: Allow very mild profanity only if it naturally fits the source.

levels.name: Средне
levels.instruction: Allow moderate casual profanity while keeping the line natural rather than shock-oriented.

levels.name: Грубо
levels.tooltip: Заметная грубость и более острые формулировки.
levels.instruction: Use clear crude/profane wording where it fits, without adding new sexual facts.

levels.name: Очень грубо
levels.tooltip: Максимально вульгарная взрослая подача в рамках исходного смысла.
levels.instruction: Use strong crude adult wording and profanity when semantically possible, preserving the original intent.

levels.name: Нет
levels.instruction: Do not add sexual tension or suggestive subtext.

levels.name: Едва
levels.tooltip: Едва заметная химия, если она уже есть в исходнике.
levels.instruction: Keep any suggestive energy very subtle and only where the source supports it.

levels.name: Намек
levels.instruction: Use noticeable suggestive subtext without explicit erotic wording.

levels.name: Горячо
levels.tooltip: Сильная химия и взрослая интимная подача.
levels.instruction: Make the adult chemistry strong and intimate while avoiding invented explicit acts.

levels.name: На грани
levels.tooltip: Максимально suggestive без добавления новых фактов.
levels.instruction: Push the suggestive adult tension to the edge allowed by the source without adding new explicit details.

levels.name: Обходно
levels.instruction: Phrase the message indirectly and gently, with softened edges.

levels.name: Мягко
levels.instruction: Keep the message clear but tactful and softened.

levels.name: Нормально
levels.instruction: Use normal directness: clear, natural, and not pushy.

levels.name: Уверенно
levels.instruction: Use confident direct wording with few hedges.

levels.name: В лоб
levels.instruction: Be very direct, concise, and assertive while preserving the source intent.

casual_dm.label: Casual DM
casual_dm.context: casual DM with an adult follower

flirty.label: Флирт
flirty.context: flirty DM with an adult follower

sensual.label: Чувственно
sensual.context: sensual adult private chat without crude wording

vulgar_flirt.label: Вульгарный флирт
vulgar_flirt.context: crude adult flirt in private messages

interactionRules.instruction: Because flirt is off, keep suggestive wording subtle and do not make the message romantic.
Use clear flirt through warmth, confidence, and implication rather than profanity or crude wording.
Profanity may be casual or emphatic, but avoid turning the line sexually explicit.
Make the line sensual through pacing and implication, not crude vocabulary.
Make the flirt confident and clear instead of coy.
Keep the flirt softer and more implied because directness is low.
Use short modern DM syntax and avoid overexplaining.
Keep the flirt polished and adult, without internet slang.
If the source allows it, make the adult flirt dirtier while preserving meaning.
Use charged implication rather than blunt sexual wording.
Keep profanity natural for American DMs, not theatrical.

actions.alternative: Produce a meaning-preserving alternative that is not just punctuation, casing, or word-order changes.
actions.shorter: Make it shorter and tighter while preserving the core intent.
actions.softer: Make it softer and less intense while preserving the intent.
actions.bolder: Make it bolder, more confident, and more teasing without inventing new facts.
actions.more_vulgar: Make it more vulgar or profane if the source meaning allows it, without inventing new acts or facts.
actions.apply_settings: Rewrite the previous result to reflect the changed style settings while preserving the Russian source meaning.
